articles.title: Momfluencers Are Pitching AI as a Better ‘Coparent’ Than Men
articles.raw_content: Moms are outsourcing tedious household tasks to ChatGPT and selling courses teaching others to do the same. Where are all the dads?
articles.summary: Madres están externalizando tareas domésticas a ChatGPT y vendiendo cursos para enseñar a otros a hacer lo mismo.

articles.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
articles.raw_content: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.
articles.summary: Las grandes empresas de inteligencia artificial planean salir a bolsa, lo que probablemente provocará nuevos aumentos de precios.
